# keel

> AI deal intelligence for B2B sales reps. Sara is your AI deal companion who surfaces the gap between what you think is happening and what actually is — before it costs you the deal.

## What this is

keel is an AI-powered deal-intelligence tool for quota-carrying B2B Account Executives. It connects to your calls, emails, and CRM, then runs a 2-minute Socratic debrief after every call asking the questions your brain skipped.

Founded 2026. Beta opens August 2026.

## Key facts

- Product: Sara — an AI deal companion for B2B AEs
- Pricing: Free during beta. Founding members lock in a permanent rate after.
- Stage: Pre-launch, accepting founding cohort applications
- Target user: Mid-market B2B AEs carrying 8–20 active deals
- Differentiator: Rep-first, not manager-first. Sara reports to you, not your org chart.

## How Sara works

1. Sara listens — connects to calls, emails, and CRM
2. Sara asks — runs a 2-minute Socratic debrief after every call
3. Sara tells you first — flags drift before it costs you the deal

## Use cases

- Catching silent deal drift before quarter-end surprises
- Spotting a champion who's gone quiet before the deal collapses
- Getting an objective read on budget re-opens and competitor activity
- 2-minute post-call debrief without filling out CRM fields

## Differentiators vs competitors

- vs Gong / Chorus: Sara works for the rep, not the manager. No performance scoring, no manager reports.
- vs Conversation Intelligence tools: Sara asks Socratic questions, doesn't just transcribe.
- vs CRM hygiene tools: Works even when your CRM is a mess. Builds the picture from what you say.

## Common questions

- Will my manager see what Sara flags? — No. Sara reports to you first.
- How long is the debrief? — Two minutes. Three to four targeted questions.
- Does Sara work with a messy CRM? — Yes. That's the environment she was designed for.
- Do I need IT/manager approval to sign up? — No. Individual sign-up, no procurement.
